title: Podoiyok
description: Podoiyok is the only optimization modpack you will ever need!
body:
Podoiyok is a modpack made just for optimization and it maybe has just 1 or 2 tweaks like server country flags but smt else than that nope yeah 100% optimized u can try on old hardware its gonna run like a rocket bro :D
